children.text: supporting the startup of new charter schools, the replication of high-quality charter schools, and the expansion of high-quality charter schools;
assisting charter schools in accessing credit to acquire and renovate facilities for school use; and

children.label: B
children.text: the dissemination of best practices of charter schools for all schools;

children.label: C
children.text: the evaluation of the impact of the charter school program under this part on schools participating in such program; and
reserve 12.5 percent to support charter school facilities assistance under ;section 7221c of this title
reserve 22.5 percent to carry out national activities under ; andsection 7221d of this title
use the remaining amount after the reservations under paragraphs (1) and (2) to carry out .section 7221b of this title

children.heading: Prior grants and subgrants
children.label: c Prior grants and subgrants
children.text: The recipient of a grant or subgrant under part B of title V (as such part was in effect on the day before ) shall continue to receive funds in accordance with the terms and conditions of such grant or subgrant.December 10, 2015
